description: wave-1 harvest logging port on the shared kernel v1.3 + wave-1 shared log-family store. Harvest is a log (isMovement false); seeding/transplanting movements are isLog:false per the bound movement-as-log-taxonomy decision. Official numerics (yield_total, log_count) are confirmed-only per the bound pending-status-gates decision — the one chosen divergence from the source, surfaced via pending-only partners.
